TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Rodrigo_Duterte, title = Rodrigo_Duterte, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rodrigo_Duterte} }

S.FORM: I 1945 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Rodrigo Duterte, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Philippines anini i ci Rodrigo Duterte, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 30 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ro~u…¨~…ģri*o~u …¨~…ģo~u~ut…ôrt…ô, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u pńßi…ĺippin…ôs anini i ¶i ro~u…¨~…ģri*o~u …¨~…ģo~u~ut…ôrt…ô, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1945 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Rodrigo Duterte, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Philippines anini i ci Rodrigo Duterte, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 30 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ro~u…¨~…ģri*o~u …¨~…ģo~u~ut…ôrt…ô, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u pńßi…ĺippin…ôs anini i ¶i ro~u…¨~…ģri*o~u …¨~…ģo~u~ut…ôrt…ô, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
